compiled_state.title: E7: delete the bash dispatcher + engine (E7e reconciler/validate off REBAR_TICKET_CLI first, then delete .sh+helpers+shims), then E9 docs+close
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Final step of Tier E: delete the bash engine so rebar has ONE implementation (Python) + three facades. All in-process ports (E0-E6.5a), shim rewires (E6a/E7a), GAP translations (E8), and the bash-dependent test side (E7c) are DONE. The in-process CLI no longer touches the dispatcher (rebar._run/_passthrough are dead). What remains: sever the last two RUNTIME consumers of the dispatcher, then delete the engine, then docs+close.

## E7e (BLOCKER — must land before deleting the dispatcher)
The reconciler (which STAYS) and validate still subprocess the bash dispatcher to read tickets:
- engine_env() sets REBAR_TICKET_CLI = dispatcher(); read in rebar_reconciler/{applier.py:406, invariants.py:26, reconcile.py:447} -> runs [cli_path, list/show/...].
- _engine_support/validate.py:_default_ticket_cmd() returns engine_dir()/ticket; run_checks -> check_interface_contracts subprocesses it (even when TICKET_CMD unset = production).
Fix: add src/rebar/__main__.py (python -m rebar -> rebar._cli.main), repoint REBAR_TICKET_CLI + _default_ticket_cmd at the in-process CLI (console script via shutil.which, or [sys.executable,'-m','rebar']; callers treat it as one path so __main__.py + console-script path is cleanest). Then RE-RUN a live reconciler dry-run vs DIG to confirm it still reads local tickets (LIVE-DIG authorized).

## E7-final (delete, one commit, after E7e green)
DELETE: _engine/rebar + ticket; all 36 _engine/*.sh; dispatcher-only helpers (ticket-reducer.py, ticket-graph.py, ticket-reads.py, ticket-commands.py, ticket-delete-unlink-scan.py, ticket-alias-compute.py, ticket-alias-resolve.py, ticket-list-descendants.py, ticket-unblock.py, ticket-bridge-fsck.py); the 5 shims (ticket_reducer/, ticket_graph/, ticket_reads.py, ticket_resolver.py, ticket_output.py); ticket_txn.py.
KEEP: _engine/rebar_reconciler/, jira-capability-probe.py, resources/ticket-wordlist.txt.
_engine.py: delete dispatcher() + run(); KEEP engine_dir()/engine_env()/wordlist_path() (reconciler+probe+_alias need them); drop the REBAR_TICKET_CLI=dispatcher() line in engine_env.
__init__.py: delete dead _run() + the run/dispatcher import. _cli/__init__.py: delete dead _passthrough() + its dispatcher import.
tests/unit/test_engine_dir.py: change dispatcher().is_file() assertion -> engine_dir/wordlist/reconciler exist (KEEP the rest; engine_dir survives + the no-top-level-names guard matters more now). _engine_path.py SURVIVES.
Modernize stderr usage strings that still say 'Usage: ticket-list-descendants.py' / 'ticket-reads.py' (descendants.py:80, reads.py:760) -> rebar form (byte-parity tests already deleted, so safe).

## E9
docs/architecture.md offender table -> empty + engine-import-boundary note; docs/bash-migration.md §7 -> DONE; note the help golden is now _cli/_help-anchored. Exhaustive dogfood (3 interfaces, fsck clean, reconcile dry-run). Close adult-oxide-slave then nervy-hold-dip.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] E7e: src/rebar/__main__.py added; REBAR_TICKET_CLI + _default_ticket_cmd point at the in-process CLI; live reconciler dry-run vs DIG green
- [ ] Zero src/rebar/_engine/*.sh; dispatcher + 9 helpers + 5 shims + ticket_txn deleted
- [ ] engine_dir/engine_env/wordlist_path + rebar_reconciler/ + jira-capability-probe.py + wordlist KEPT and working
- [ ] _run/_passthrough/dispatcher()/run() deleted; no dead imports
- [ ] Full pytest suite green (zero tests/**/*.sh already achieved); opus-review the cutover
- [ ] E9 docs updated; adult-oxide-slave + nervy-hold-dip closed

comments.body:
E7e DONE (commit abbdd1bc, local main). Reconciler + validate severed off the bash dispatcher.

- Added src/rebar/__main__.py (python -m rebar -> rebar._cli.main, propagates exit code).
- Added rebar._engine.in_process_cli(): resolves the in-process 'rebar' console script next to sys.executable (hermetic/PATH-independent, shutil.which with PATH fallback). Single-token by design (callers treat REBAR_TICKET_CLI as one path).
- Repointed engine_env() REBAR_TICKET_CLI default + validate._default_ticket_cmd() at in_process_cli().
- Repointed the reconciler idempotency integration test at in_process_cli() (now a regression test for E7e).

LIVE-DIG VALIDATION: rebar reconcile --mode dry-run (a) var unset -> engine_env injects in_process_cli, and (b) REBAR_TICKET_CLI explicitly = dev-venv in-process console script (confirmed 'from rebar.cli import main', no bash) BOTH read local tickets and computed an identical 167-mutation plan (0 applied, no writes). Broad suite 1663 passed/0 failed; -m integration 8 passed. opus-reviewed: SOUND, no blockers.

Review follow-up folded into E7-final: repoint the 3 reconciler REBAR_TICKET_CLI-absent fallbacks (invariants.py:26 +stale docstring, reconcile.py:447, applier.py:406) off the dispatcher path -> in_process_cli() in the deletion commit (dead on the production path since engine_env always sets the var).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
E7-final DONE (commit e3507895, local main). The bash engine is DELETED — rebar is one Python implementation behind three facades, zero bash dependency. 74 files changed, 11090 deletions.

DELETED: _engine/{rebar,ticket} + 36 .sh + 10 ticket-*.py helpers + 5 compat shims (ticket_reducer/, ticket_graph/, ticket_reads.py, ticket_resolver.py, ticket_output.py) + ticket_txn.py. KEPT: rebar_reconciler/, jira-capability-probe.py, resources/.
LIBRARY SURGERY: removed _engine.dispatcher()/run(); __init__._run() + import + 'dispatcher' __all__ export; _cli._passthrough() (the _dispatch fall-through is now a RuntimeError invariant guard — all 45 subcommands route in-process, main() rejects unknowns first, fall-through proven unreachable); repointed 3 reconciler REBAR_TICKET_CLI fallbacks to in_process_cli(); removed dead _main shim from output.py.
TESTS: rewired the last 7 engine-coupled tests in-process (concurrency_regression now characterizes the PYTHON write/sync/lock path under real cross-process concurrency; schema_coverage reads _help.known_subcommands(); engine_dir asserts the kept assets; bridge/reducer/compute tests). 

DISCOVERED (linked discovered_from): roam-crone-disco — sign/verify-signature advertise --output json but have no registered schema (pre-existing PR #4 gap, masked by the old bash-parsing schema test; now excluded explicitly with a ticket ref).

VERIFIED: broad suite 1662 passed/0 failed; integration 8 passed; ruff clean on all changed files; python -m rebar + all 45 subcommands' help work; live DIG reconciler dry-run reads local tickets via the in-process CLI. opus-reviewed the cutover: SHIP IT (no blockers).

REMAINING on this ticket: E9 (docs: architecture offender table -> empty, bash-migration §7 DONE; exhaustive dogfood; close adult-oxide-slave then nervy-hold-dip).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
E9 DONE (docs commit 8ceb7113). The bash→Python migration is COMPLETE.

DOCS (current-state rewrite, no migration-narration qualifiers):
- docs/architecture.md: three interfaces are thin layers over one in-process Python core (_cli/_commands/_store/reducer/graph/_engine_support); CLI is argparse (not a dispatcher pass-through); library is in-process (not subprocess _run); output parsing = rebar._engine_support.output; write core = rebar._commands.txn. Rewrote the engine-import-boundary section (no compat shims; engine_env scopes the engine dir onto PYTHONPATH only for the reconciler + Jira-probe subprocesses; REBAR_TICKET_CLI = in-process CLI). Refreshed the over-cap offender table to the real current Python files (reconcile.py 1305, outbound_differ.py 1114, __init__.py 830); dropped the obsolete 'prefer deleting bash' module-size bullet.
- docs/bash-migration.md: COMPLETE status banner + §7 (Tier E) marked DONE with the actual delete/keep outcome; help goldens are _cli/_help-anchored.

EXHAUSTIVE DOGFOOD (all green):
- CLI (production pipx rebar, fresh repo): init->create->claim->comment->transition->show->reopen->list->compact->scratch(set/get/clear)->fsck->delete --user-approved; non-interactive uninit correctly errors with NO tracker created (consent gate).
- Library: init_repo->create_ticket->claim->comment->show_ticket->transition; stale transition raises ConcurrencyError (exit-10 contract); search works.
- MCP: build_server() -> 33 tools registered, all expected present, show_ticket advertises outputSchema.
- fsck on the live tracker: clean (no issues).
- reconcile --mode dry-run vs live DIG: reads local tickets via the in-process CLI, computed 708 mutations, 0 applied (no writes).

Closing this E7 ticket. Remaining migration close-out: close story adult-oxide-slave, then epic nervy-hold-dip.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
